query:
-- فحص بيانات الحضور للعمال في الدفعة
SELECT 
  ae.worker_id,
  w.full_name,
  w.code,
  DATE(ae.event_time) AS event_date,
  ae.event_type,
  TIME(ae.event_time) AS event_time,
  ae.method
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE ae.worker_id IN (90013, 90014, 90015)
  AND DATE(ae.event_time) BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-02'
ORDER BY ae.worker_id, ae.event_time;

-- فحص تفاصيل الدفعة الكاملة
SELECT 
  pb.id,
  pb.batch_code,
  pb.period_start,
  pb.period_end,
  pb.total_amount,
  pb.total_workers,
  pb.status,
  pb.created_at
FROM payroll_batches pb
WHERE pb.batch_code = 'Batch-2026-02-001';

  w.code,

  ae.event_type,
  TIME(ae.event_time) AS event_time,
  ae.method
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE ae.worker_id IN (90013, 90014, 90015)
  AND DATE(ae.event_time) BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-02'
ORDER BY ae.worker_id, ae.event_time;

-- فحص تفاصيل الدفعة الكاملة
SELECT 
  pb.id,

  pb.total_amount,
  pb.total_workers,
  pb.status,
  pb.created_at
FROM payroll_batches pb
